description_long: This bungalow features a modern, flat-roofed design with a green rooftop that includes planted trees and open courtyards. The structure is primarily rectangular with a large cut-out section forming an internal courtyard, visible from above. The exterior walls are clad in a light wood or wood-like material, and the roof is covered in grass, blending the building with its surroundings. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to outdoor spaces, including a patio with outdoor seating and a small pool. The building includes a garage with space for two vehicles and several distinct outdoor living areas. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, emphasizing open space and integration with nature.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a green rooftop, wood-clad exterior, internal courtyards, and large windows. Features include a garage, patio, and integrated landscaping.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the main facade with the garage, patio seating area, and a large section of the green rooftop with trees and open courtyards.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the rear and side of the bungalow, revealing the internal courtyard, rooftop greenery, and a pool area.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the garage entrance, driveway, and a prominent tree near the front, as well as the main entry points and large windows.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the back and side, showing the window arrangement, rooftop trees, and the pool area with outdoor furniture.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
